steps.title: Read the slope of line k
steps.content:
The equation is in slope-intercept form.
$$y=-\frac{13}{4}x+6$$
So line $k$ has slope $-\frac{13}{4}$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so flip the fraction and change the sign.
$$m_j=\frac{4}{13}$$
The answer is 4/13.
